title: Amenti

notes:
I had a similar issue with Abiotic Factor where an Nvidia driver update seemingly broke TAA. In that game I was able to switch to an alternate AA method via the config file.

I can't find much information on Amenti and the standard UE config file tweaks to disable AA do not seem to work. I'm guessing this game has forced TAA that can't be disabled.
title: Amenti
